---
title: "Aulas da disciplina"
subtitle: "PPEC0039 — Estatística e Planejamento de Experimentos"

page-layout: full

listing:
  contents:
    - "Notebooks/*.ipynb"

  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3

  fields:
    - image
    - title
    - description

  image-height: 250px
  image-placeholder: "Notebooks/capa_padrao.png"
  image-lazy-loading: false

  grid-item-border: false
  grid-item-align: left

  categories: false
  filter-ui: false
  sort-ui: false

  page-size: 9
  sort: "title asc"

toc: false
---
